---
title: "Silver Peak Ski Tour 6/4/2021"
---

## Stats

- Hoping at most 5 miles round trip, ~2,100 ft gain (depends on road driveability)
- 1:20 hr drive

## Itinerary

Low 40's (41-45 degrees), 8mph winds, dawn at 4:33 AM, sunrise 5:13 AM

- 3:00 AM - Leave home
- 4:20 AM - Furthest can drive ([Silver Peak Trailhead](https://goo.gl/maps/faicKZf1mbABkM818))
- 4:40 AM - Hiking/skiing up (2.5 miles, 2,100 ft gain, 1:30 hr)
- 6:10 AM - At top of North Bowl, transition to downhill
- 6:30 AM - Ski down (max 45 mins depending on how much walking)
- 7:15 AM - Back at car
- 7:30 AM - Drive home
- 9:00 AM - Home

## Gear

- Light jacket
- Ski pants
- Gloves
- Helmet
- Beacon/shovel/probe
- Rain jacket (for wind?)

## North Bowl May/June conditions

Looking up...
